description_long: This hamburger features a thick, golden-brown oat-topped bun with visible sesame seeds and grains on its surface. The top bun is slightly domed and covers a generous stack of toppings, including a slice of cheddar cheese, a juicy tomato slice, crisp pickles, and a layer of lettuce. The patty appears to be a grilled beef or plant-based patty, with a slightly charred edge peeking out beneath the cheese. A layer of creamy white sauce or mayonnaise is visible both above and below the patty, adding to the burger's richness. The overall appearance is appetizing, with the ingredients neatly layered and the bun maintaining a soft, fresh look.
description: A hearty hamburger with a seeded oat-topped bun, layered with cheese, tomato, pickles, lettuce, and creamy sauce. The patty and toppings are neatly stacked, creating a visually appealing and appetizing sandwich.
description_view_0: The front view shows the oat-topped bun, a thick slice of tomato, pickles, lettuce, cheese, and a visible patty with sauce peeking out.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cheese melting over the patty, with the tomato and lettuce more centered and the sauce more prominent at the bottom.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the pickles and tomato, with the cheese and patty visible beneath the bun and a clear layer of sauce.
description_view_3: This angle shows the tomato and cheese most prominently, with the lettuce and pickles partially visible and the bun's oat and seed texture clear.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are layered with lettuce and pickles above the patty, followed by a slice of tomato and melted cheese, all sandwiched between the top and bottom buns with visible sauce.
